sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current player position and proximity to targets
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
green = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N'][0]
blue_targets = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 12]  # charcoal frames

gb = (min(p[0] for p in green['boundary']), min(p[1] for p in green['boundary']))
print(f"Green player at: {gb}")
for bt in blue_targets:
    tb = (min(p[0] for p in bt['boundary']), min(p[1] for p in bt['boundary']))
    print(f"Charcoal frame at: {tb}, dist={abs(gb[0]-tb[0]) + abs(gb[1]-tb[1])}")

# Check if player is adjacent to any target
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
green_id = green['id']
print(f"Green node id: {green_id}")
for pair in adj:
    if green_id in pair:
        other = pair[0] if pair[1] == green_id else pair[1]
        other_node = seg[other]
        print(f"Green adjacent to: node {other}, color={other_node['color']}, pixels={other_node['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
